title: Create your workspace
subtitle: Alga PSA Solo is a one-person plan for independent MSPs. Subscribe to create your workspace and start managing your clients, tickets, and invoices.
androidNotice: Subscriptions from this app are only available on iOS. Please create a workspace from our website.
disclosure: Payment will be charged to your Apple ID. Subscription automatically renews unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage or cancel in your Apple ID Settings.

errors.loadProductsFailed: Unable to contact the App Store.
errors.iosOnly: Subscriptions are only available on iOS.
errors.provisionFailed: Purchase went through but we couldn't provision your workspace. Please contact support.
errors.nothingToRestore: No prior purchase was found on this Apple ID.
errors.restoreNotProvisioned: This purchase hasn't been used to create a workspace yet. Please use 'Subscribe' instead.
errors.checkEmailFailed: Unable to verify email availability. Please try again.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account already exists for this email. Please sign in instead, or use a different email address.
